possible_cents_symbol_misread.description: Money or coin context suggests a trailing zero may be a missing cents symbol.

visual_reference_required_or_helpful.description: Prompt depends on a map, graph, diagram, number line, table, picture, or spatial layout.

contextual_coherence_failure.description: Adjacent or merged text blocks do not logically belong together.

possible_layout_block_merge_error.description: Text from separate visual regions may have been merged by reading-order extraction.

sidebar_factoid_detected.description: A factoid/sidebar block was identified and should not be treated as a student prompt.

pdf_text_layer_incomplete.description: Embedded PDF text is sparse or missing relative to the rendered page image.

numbered_item_count_mismatch.description: PDF text and OCR/visible text disagree about the number of worksheet items.

semantic_plausibility_failure.description: The extracted problem does not make educational or mathematical sense.

ambiguous_fraction_layout.description: Fraction layout is likely corrupted or ambiguous.

external_page_reference.description: Question depends on another page not included in the current extracted context.

missing_visible_item.description: A visible numbered problem or prompt is absent from extracted structure.

issue_record_template.extracted_text: Draw lines between these words and their Earthquakes can cause rivers to temporarily flow backwards abbreviations.

suggested_structure.main_instruction: Draw lines between these words and their abbreviations.
suggested_structure.factoid_sidebar: Earthquakes can cause rivers to temporarily flow backwards.

issue_record_template.reason: The factoid is visually separated and semantically unrelated to the abbreviation-matching instruction.
issue_record_template.recommended_action: Separate into distinct blocks; include factoid only as optional note or omit from student worksheet.
